name: Stuffed Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Cut the zucchini in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds with a spoon.
3. Mix together corn, cottage cheese, salt, black pepper, and chopped green onions.
4. Spoon the mixture into the zucchini halves, mounding slightly. Top each with grated Parmesan cheese.
5. Place the stuffed zucchini in a buttered 8 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 15 minutes, or until the zucchini is tender and the cheese topping has melted.
SERVE AS A VEGETABLE MAIN COURSE. WHILE THE SQUASH IS BAKING YOU'LL HAVE MORE THAN ENOUGH TIME TO MAKE A TOMATO SALAD.
